title: Luffy Enters the War: Key Exchange
description: In the Marineford War storyline, this section centers on Spandam, Magellan, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #10, Brook, Unknown person #20 as the scene develops across pages 9–12.
scene: This scene advances the Marineford War conflict through Spandam, Magellan, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #10, Brook, focusing on the immediate stakes of luffy enters the war: key exchange.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: In logustown, the town of beginnings.

dialogue.speaker: Magellan
dialogue.text: The legend of Roger the Pirate King...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Don't interfere with the ex- equation...!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #22
dialogue.text: Until Marine Ford was half destroyed.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #25
dialogue.text: Guess there'll be more pirates, OIMO.

dialogue.speaker: Brook
dialogue.text: Did you hear the news, tonjit!?

dialogue.speaker: Magellan
dialogue.text: Someday I'll be the world stilts champion

dialogue.speaker: Spandam
dialogue.text: We must become strong!!! Stronger than justice!!!

summary: This scene advances the Marineford War conflict through Spandam, Magellan, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #10, Brook, focusing on the immediate stakes of luffy enters the war: key exchange.
